omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Where the Personal Data of Users are collected by the Organiser on their event page, that Organiser is the Controller of such Personal Data. For the additional information collected by Organisers on their brand page, Users' data privacy questions and requests should be submitted to the Organiser in its capacity as the Users' Controller. We are not responsible for Organisers' privacy or security practices or the data retention period which may be different from this notice. Organisers of Our Platform are solely responsible for establishing policies for and ensuring compliance with all applicable laws and regulations, as well as any and all privacy policies, agreements, or other obligations, relating to the collection of Personal Data in connection with the use of their brand page by the Users.
